name: Ascendant Dragon Vessel
description:
This vessel can be a potion bottle, drinking horn, or other container meant to hold a liquid.
As a bonus action, if the vessel is empty, you can speak the command word to fill the vessel with one of the following (your choice): ale, olive oil, mead, wine, whiskey, a {@item potion of healing}, a {@item potion of greater healing}, a {@item potion of superior healing}, a {@item potion of supreme healing}, a {@item potion of climbing}, a {@item potion of fire breath}, a {@item potion of flying}, or
